description_long: This is a white ceramic mug with a cylindrical shape, featuring a large, rounded handle attached to one side. The exterior is visibly worn and stained, with smudges and dark marks distributed across the surface, giving it a used and somewhat dirty appearance. Prominently displayed on the side is vintage Mobil branding, including the red Pegasus logo and the words 'Mobiloil' and 'Mobilgas', along with the years 1893 and 1933. There is a vertical ruler graphic and several fingerprint-like marks on one side, adding to the mug's distinctive, industrial look. The rim and interior are plain, with some visible dirt and wear, and the base sits flat on a wooden surface. The overall impression is of a well-used, collectible or garage-style mug, likely found in urban garages or workshops.
description: A worn white ceramic mug with a large handle, vintage Mobil branding, and visible stains and marks, giving it a used, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, fingerprint marks, ruler graphic, and partial Mobil branding.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle fully visible, more of the 'Mobiloil' text, and heavy surface staining.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle on the left, ruler graphic, fingerprint marks, and visible interior wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red Pegasus Mobilgas logo, fingerprint marks, and less of the handle.
